name: UV Star-Forming Region Census
description:
Analyze the FUV galaxy image at ~/AstroImages/uv_census/uit_galaxy.fits to identify UV knots using a calculated detection threshold (T = Mean + (3 * StdDev)) derived from a 50x50 background ROI at the top-left corner (X=0, Y=0). The analysis should include a Gaussian Blur (Sigma 2.0) and particle detection for sizes 5 to Infinity with circularity 0.00-1.00. Export the findings to ~/AstroImages/measurements/uv_knots_report.txt using the following format:

Background_Mean: <value>
Background_StdDev: <value>
Calculated_Threshold: <value>
Total_Knots: <value>
Total_Area: <value>
